content.full_text:
November 5, 2003

Anthony W. Farrington
District Four Supervisor, Lake County
255 No. Forbes Street
Lakeport, CA 95453

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-03-224

Dear Mr. Farrington:

As I indicated in our conversation on October 7, 2003, the Commission is unable to comply with your request for formal written advice within the expedited time frame you required. As I explained, we could not issue written advice as requested by October 10, 2003, for the agenda item scheduled on October 15, 2003.

We must decline your request for advice after-the-fact since that would amount to advice on past conduct. (See § 83114; subd. (b); regulation 18329, subd. (b)(8)(A)&(C), copy enclosed). Accordingly, we are withdrawing your request for advice.

Should you have any further questions, please contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: [signature]
Staff Counsel

Enclosure
JS:jg
